moments.title: World Cup 2026 Group Stage Heats Up
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage is in full swing, with pivotal matches continuing daily before the knockout rounds begin on June 28th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup group stage is delivering daily drama! Who's impressed you most so far, and which team is heading for glory?

angles.name: Scotland Match
angles.copy: Scotland are facing Brazil in the World Cup group stage on June 24th! Can the Tartan Army pull off a shock? Get your predictions in!

angles.name: England Match
angles.copy: England takes on Ghana in the World Cup group stage on June 23rd! Will the Three Lions roar to victory and secure their spot?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival continues today and concludes tomorrow, June 21st, with headliners Calvin Harris and The Cure bringing the legendary event to a close.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Who's at the Isle of Wight Festival this weekend? Calvin Harris tonight, The Cure tomorrow! What's been your highlight?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: The Cure are set to close out Isle of Wight Festival tomorrow! Which classic track are you hoping they pull out?

angles.name: Dance Anthem
angles.copy: Calvin Harris is bringing the party to the Isle of Wight tonight! Get ready for some serious festival vibes. What's your favourite Harris track?

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Takes Over Glasgow Green
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is alive with music as TRNSMT Festival runs from June 19-21, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Richard Ashcroft, and Kasabian.

angles.name: Glasgow Party
angles.copy: TRNSMT is rocking Glasgow Green all weekend! Who are you buzzin' to see? Lewis Capaldi, Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian – a huge lineup!

angles.name: Headliner Choice
angles.copy: Kasabian and Richard Ashcroft are bringing the indie anthems to TRNSMT this weekend. What's your must-hear track from these legends?

angles.name: Scottish Talent
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi closing out TRNSMT tomorrow! Scotland's own superstar taking centre stage. What's his best song?

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Lionel Richie!
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie turns 77 today, June 20th.

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! Hope he's dancing on the ceiling 'All Night Long' today!

angles.name: Easy Listening
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the smooth voice of Lionel Richie! His hits make every day feel 'Easy Like Sunday Morning'.

angles.name: Love Songs
angles.copy: Hello! It's Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday! The master of romance, whose songs still melt hearts. What's your favourite Lionel love song?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday tomorrow, June 21st.

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Lana Del Rey turns 41 tomorrow. What's your go-to track from the 'Queen of Sadcore'?

angles.name: Summertime Sadness
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to Lana Del Rey! From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', her unique sound captures so many moods.

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper will celebrate her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Girls (and guys!) just wanna have fun celebrating Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday on Monday! What a legend.

angles.name: True Colours
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic early birthday to the colourful Cyndi Lauper, turning 73 on June 22nd! Her 'True Colors' still shine bright.

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning artist Solange Knowles celebrates her 40th birthday on June 24th.

angles.name: Birthday Buzz
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday coming up for the incredible Solange Knowles on June 24th! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Music & Style Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Solange's 40th on Wednesday! A true artist and style icon, constantly pushing boundaries in music and culture.

moments.title: Remembering George Michael
moments.blurb: British music icon George Michael, who passed away in 2016, would have celebrated his 63rd birthday on June 25th.

angles.name: Wham! Tribute
angles.copy: On June 25th, we remember the legendary George Michael, who would have been 63. His music with Wham! defined an era.

angles.name: Solo Icon
angles.copy: Remembering the incredible George Michael, who would have turned 63 on Wednesday. His solo career gave us timeless classics like 'Faith' and 'Careless Whisper'.

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande will celebrate her 33rd birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Get ready for some 'Thank U, Next' level celebrations! Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday. What's your favourite Grande anthem?

angles.name: Vocal Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy early birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande! Her vocal range and chart-topping hits continue to dominate. What track shows off her voice best?

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29th, marking the start of two weeks of world-class tennis at the All England Club.

angles.name: Tennis Season
angles.copy: It's almost time! Wimbledon 2026 starts on Monday. Who are you backing for the men's and women's singles titles this year?

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Get the strawberries and cream ready! Wimbledon kicks off on Monday, June 29th. The greatest tennis tournament is back!

moments.title: Taylor Swift Holds UK Singles Chart No.1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It I Knew You' remains at the top of the Official UK Singles Chart this week.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at number one! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It I Knew You' dominates the Official UK Singles Chart. Can anyone knock her off next week?

angles.name: New Music
angles.copy: What's new on the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Taylor Swift holds strong at number one, but who else is climbing?

moments.title: Love Island Season 13 Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of ITV2's popular reality dating show, Love Island, is currently airing, hosted by Maya Jama.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa drama continues! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's heading for a dumping? Tune in tonight!

angles.name: Fan Reactions
angles.copy: Are you hooked on Love Island Season 13? Maya Jama is back for all the fun. What's been the most shocking moment so far?

moments.title: Beyond Paradise Season 4 Premieres
moments.blurb: The fourth season of the popular Death in Paradise spin-off, Beyond Paradise, premieres on BritBox on June 24th, set in the fictional Devon town of Shipton Abbott.

angles.name: Devon Mystery
angles.copy: Great news, Devon! Beyond Paradise Season 4 lands on BritBox on Monday. More mysteries for DI Humphrey Goodman in our beautiful county!

angles.name: New Season
angles.copy: DI Humphrey Goodman is back! Beyond Paradise Season 4 premieres June 24th. Ready for more charming crime-solving?

moments.title: Queens That Changed the World S2
moments.blurb: The second season of the docuseries 'Queens That Changed the World' premieres on BBC Select on June 25th, exploring the lives of formidable female rulers.

angles.name: Historical Docuseries
angles.copy: Fascinating history alert! 'Queens That Changed the World' returns for Season 2 on BBC Select this Wednesday. Which queen are you most excited to learn about?

angles.name: Powerful Women
angles.copy: From Queen Charlotte to Marie Antoinette, explore the lives of history's most powerful female rulers. 'Queens That Changed the World' S2 premieres June 25th!
